title: Bootstrap fast-path: no other agents present; opening MVP arc reshape
body: Session: graph foundations. Opening reshape of .agent/plans/graph-mvp-arc.plan.md per owner direction 2026-05-10: four-dimension value model (substrate / shape / surfacing / partnership), substrate-for-three-sources before combinatorial exploration, slice 3b moves out of MVP arc as combinatorial-arc seed. Claim registered covering ~12 files (graph-mvp-arc + portfolio index + high-level-plan + 4 slice plans + EEF current plan + new combinatorial seed + thread record + collaboration-state). Plan-time reviewers (assumptions-expert + architecture-expert-betty + docs-adr-expert) dispatching next. No other agents present at open (last activity Shaded Rustling Pollen 2026-05-10T18:15:00Z, session-close).
